release_notes: The ASI Stack v2.0.0 is the completed canonical research/live HTML book under the reframed title. The exact tagged source, CI-tested bundle, deployed site, immutable site archive, citation metadata, and conditional path-level license snapshot are bound to commit 52e54b71681f3d04644a4142875718d7b55f6dbd. Apache-2.0 text SHA-256: cfc7749b96f63bd31c3c42b5c471bf756814053e847c10f3eb003417bc523d30.
residuals: All 54 chapter-core claims remain at argument support; this release transaction creates no support-state promotion.
The governed repository-change slice retains one explicitly recorded open residual and finite-model limits.
The live root and /latest/ channels are mutable; the GitHub Release archive is the immutable v2.0.0 rendered-site artifact.
EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, and curated-reader editions remain outside this release.
No external-human prepublication review, independent audit, DOI, or external peer review is claimed.
non_claims: does not prove ASI or AGI capability, production readiness, deployment safety, economic value, or universal governance correctness
does not promote any chapter-core claim above its recorded evidence state
does not turn finite Lean models, fixtures, synthetic attacks, or one disposable-Git slice into open-world runtime evidence
does not claim released EPUB, DOCX, PDF, audio, or curated-reader artifacts
does not claim independent legal review, third-party ownership clearance, external audit, or external-human peer review
